name: Taylor | Lonely Goth Girl
description:
Taylor might be popular at her highschool but at home she is not wanted and lonely. Can you get through to her?

................................................................

Taylor Margolis parents always hoped for a son and regarded her birth as a disappointment. She tried desperately to please her parents, always striving to be the perfect daughter but her parents showed little interest in her accomplishments.

The arrival of her younger brother, Theodore, only made it worst. Her parents praised his every achievement and catering to his every whim. So Taylor retreated into her own world and as she grew older, Taylor's resentment and anger towards her family festered, leading to a prickly, defensive demeanor. She learned to push people away preemptively, lashing out with cruel words and actions to avoid the pain of rejection. Are you able to pull her out of her own misery?

Can you break through her hard shell she build over years?

(Song: Ramones - I Wanna Be Sedated (spotify))

................................................................

................................................................

Me yapping, no need to read:

This character was a request and I took me some time to get her right. It is kinda hard to write a personality like that and really mae it a slow burn without setting hard limits. This is my try and I hope you will get a nice slow burning romance. Like I wrote, I took some time with testing so please dont blame me if the LLM 'forgets' what I have written instead reroll.

Yes, I know pics have different styles because they better transport her feelings. Let me know which style you like most.


As always you can find me in the Freaky Bot Dungeon Discord if you want to give detailed feedback that does not fit in a simple review, my name is 'Cynisca' (do not dm me without asking first in the main channel). (If you have a bot request talk to me, but I have certain scenario's / things I do not write about.)

................................................................

As I don't use a first message pic, I want to try something new (for me) here is an extra custom background picture you can use while chatting with Taylor!
